name: Black Bottom Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornstarch and sugar in a bowl.
2. Slowly add milk to the egg yolks, then stir into the sugar and cornstarch mixture.
3. Cook in a double boiler, stirring constantly, until it coats the back of a spoon. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
4. Remove one cup of this custard mixture and stir in chocolate bits until melted. Pour the chocolate mixture into the pastry shell and chill.
5. Soften the gelatin in water and add to the remaining hot custard; stir until dissolved. Add flavoring and chill until slightly thickened.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add the remaining sugar while beating, until stiff. Fold the custard/gelatin mixture into the egg whites.
7. Pile over the chocolate layer in the pie shell and chill until set.
8. Garnish with chopped walnuts.
